# Dapr

> Dapr is an open source, portable, event-driven runtime that makes it easy for developers to build resilient, stateless, and stateful microservices and agentic AI systems running on the cloud and edge.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://dapr.io/): Overview of the Dapr project, APIs, and benefits
- [Community](https://dapr.io/community/): Discord, community calls, Meteors, GitHub
- [Adopters and testimonials](https://dapr.io/testimonials/): Real-world case studies of enterprises using Dapr
- [Platform engineering](https://dapr.io/platform-engineering/): How platform teams use Dapr with Argo CD and Flux
- [Enterprise](https://dapr.io/enterprise/): Commercial Dapr offerings

## Documentation

- [Official docs](https://docs.dapr.io/): Concepts, getting started, API reference, how-to guides
- [Blog](https://blog.dapr.io/): Announcements, tutorials, ecosystem news

## Source

- [GitHub: dapr/dapr](https://github.com/dapr/dapr): Runtime source
- [GitHub: dapr/docs](https://github.com/dapr/docs): Documentation source
- [GitHub: dapr/dapr-agents](https://github.com/dapr/dapr-agents): Dapr Agents framework
